datasets.name: Agricultural statistics
datasets.description_short: Business and consumer survey data for the agricultural sector, including price expectations, production outlook, and activity indicators. Useful for tracking farm-level sentiment and agricultural market conditions across EU member states.
use_cases: What is the current price expectation among European farmers?
How has agricultural sentiment changed over time in Germany and France?
What are the production activity indicators for EU agriculture?
How do crop price expectations vary across EU member states?

datasets.name: AMECO - Annual macro-economic database
datasets.description_short: Annual macroeconomic database maintained by the European Commission covering GDP, inflation, employment, government finances and external trade for EU and major non-EU economies. The primary source for long-run historical comparisons and fiscal surveillance.
use_cases: What is the long-run trajectory of government debt as a share of GDP for Italy?
How does Germany's current account surplus compare to the EU average over the past 20 years?
What are the European Commission forecasts for GDP growth and inflation across EU countries?
How has labor productivity evolved across EU member states since 1990?
What is Spain's cyclically adjusted fiscal balance over time?

datasets.name: Banknotes
datasets.description_short: Statistics on euro banknotes in circulation, including data on denominations, issuance, processing, and counterfeiting. Tracks the physical cash supply across the euro area.
use_cases: How many 50-euro banknotes are currently in circulation?
What is the trend in euro banknote counterfeiting?
Which denominations account for the largest share of the value of cash in circulation?
How has total euro cash in circulation evolved over time?

datasets.name: Bank Lending Survey
datasets.description_short: Quarterly survey of senior loan officers at euro area banks covering credit standards, loan demand, and credit terms for loans to businesses and households. One of the ECB's key tools for monitoring bank lending conditions.
use_cases: Are euro area banks tightening or loosening credit standards for business loans?
How has demand for mortgages changed in the euro area?
What factors are banks citing as drivers of changes in credit conditions?
How do lending conditions for SMEs compare to those for large corporates?

datasets.name: Balance sheet items of other monetary financial institutions
datasets.description_short: Balance sheet data for monetary financial institutions other than the central bank, covering assets and liabilities by counterpart sector, currency and maturity. Complements the BSI dataset with additional breakdowns.
use_cases: What is the total deposit base of euro area banks broken down by currency?
How are MFI assets distributed across different counterpart sectors?
What is the maturity structure of loans granted by euro area banks?
How have bank liabilities changed since the introduction of QE?

datasets.name: Balance of Payments
datasets.description_short: Euro area and member state balance of payments statistics following IMF BPM6 methodology, covering current account, capital account, financial account, and international investment position. The core dataset for external sector analysis.
use_cases: What is the euro area current account balance and how has it evolved?
How large are portfolio investment inflows into the euro area?
What is Germany's bilateral trade surplus with the United States?
How do FDI flows compare across euro area countries?
What is the breakdown of the euro area current account by income category?

datasets.name: Balance Sheet Items (MFI)
datasets.description_short: Monthly consolidated balance sheet of monetary financial institutions in the euro area, covering loans, deposits, securities, and other assets and liabilities broken down by sector, maturity, and currency. The main source for monetary statistics.
use_cases: What is the total stock of loans to the non-financial private sector in the euro area?
How have household deposits at euro area banks evolved over time?
What is the currency composition of MFI balance sheets?
How do loans to non-financial corporations compare across euro area countries?
What is the maturity breakdown of MFI lending?

datasets.name: Balance Sheet Items (MFI) - Provisional
datasets.description_short: Provisional version of the MFI balance sheet statistics, released ahead of the final BSI data. Provides early estimates of bank loans, deposits, and other balance sheet items for the euro area.
use_cases: What are the latest provisional estimates of euro area bank lending?
How do provisional MFI balance sheet figures compare to final data?
What is the early read on household credit growth in the euro area?

datasets.name: Capital Adequacy
datasets.description_short: Capital adequacy statistics for the European car market, covering new car registrations and production. Used as an economic activity indicator for the automotive sector.
use_cases: How many new cars were registered in Germany last month?
What is the trend in new car registrations across the euro area?
How does car production compare to pre-pandemic levels?

datasets.name: Consolidated Banking Data
datasets.description_short: Consolidated balance sheet and income statement data for EU banking groups on a home-country consolidated basis, covering capital adequacy, asset quality, profitability, and liquidity. Key source for macroprudential analysis.
use_cases: What is the average CET1 capital ratio for euro area banks?
How has the non-performing loan ratio evolved in Italian banks?
What is the return on equity for the EU banking sector?
How do capital buffers compare across EU banking systems?

datasets.name: Consolidated Banking Data 2
datasets.description_short: Extended consolidated banking data with additional breakdowns including counterparty sector, portfolio classification (IFRS), and exposure types, providing a more granular view of EU banking group balance sheets.
use_cases: How are EU banks' assets classified across different IFRS portfolio categories?
What is the breakdown of non-performing exposures by counterparty sector?
How do EU banks' cross-border exposures compare across host countries?
What is the trend in loan loss provisions across EU banking systems?

datasets.name: Central counterparty clearing
datasets.description_short: Statistics on central counterparty clearing houses (CCPs) operating in the EU, covering cleared volumes, initial and variation margin, collateral, and risk indicators. Key for financial stability monitoring.
use_cases: What is the total value of positions cleared through EU CCPs?
How has initial margin at European clearing houses evolved?
What types of instruments are being cleared through EU CCPs?
How do collateral requirements at CCPs compare across systems?

datasets.name: Consumer Expectations Survey
datasets.description_short: ECB household survey on consumer expectations covering inflation perceptions and expectations, spending intentions, labor market views, and housing market outlook, with breakdowns by age, income, and other demographics.
use_cases: What do European households expect inflation to be in one year?
How do inflation expectations differ across income groups?
What share of households plan to make major purchases in the next year?
How has consumer confidence in labor market conditions evolved?

datasets.name: Composite Indicator of Systemic Stress
datasets.description_short: ECB composite index measuring systemic stress in the euro area financial system, combining indicators from money markets, bond markets, equity markets, banking, and foreign exchange markets into a single gauge of financial stability risk.
use_cases: What is the current level of systemic financial stress in the euro area?
Which market segment is contributing most to financial stress right now?
How does today's CISS reading compare to the 2008 financial crisis or 2011 sovereign debt crisis?
What is the trend in financial system stress over the past six months?

datasets.name: Country-Level Index of Financial Stress
datasets.description_short: Country-level indicator of financial stress measuring stress in equity, bond, foreign exchange, and banking markets for individual EU countries. Complements the CISS by providing a country-specific view of financial stability.
use_cases: Which euro area country is currently experiencing the most financial stress?
How does Italy's financial stress index compare to Spain's?
How did financial stress in Greece evolve during the sovereign debt crisis?
What is the current CLIFS reading for France and Germany?

datasets.name: Covered bond purchase programme
datasets.description_short: Data on the ECB's covered bond purchase programmes (CBPP1, CBPP2, CBPP3), including holdings, purchases, and redemptions. Tracks the ECB's direct interventions in covered bond markets as part of its unconventional monetary policy.
use_cases: What is the current stock of covered bonds held by the ECB under CBPP3?
How have ECB covered bond purchases evolved over time?
What is the redemption profile of the ECB's covered bond portfolio?
Which countries' covered bonds make up the largest share of ECB holdings?

datasets.name: Debt securities markets
datasets.description_short: Statistics on debt securities issued by euro area residents, covering outstanding amounts, issuance, and redemptions by sector, currency, and maturity. The main reference for bond market analysis in the euro area.
use_cases: What is the total stock of corporate bonds issued by euro area non-financial corporations?
How has government bond issuance in the euro area changed over time?
What is the maturity breakdown of outstanding euro area debt securities?
How has covered bond issuance evolved in different euro area countries?

datasets.name: Daily data
datasets.description_short: High-frequency daily dataset aggregating key financial and economic indicators from multiple ECB sources including exchange rates, money market rates, balance of payments, and financial market data. Useful for real-time economic monitoring.
use_cases: What is today's euro effective exchange rate?
How have daily money market conditions evolved this week?
What are the latest daily capital flow indicators for the euro area?
What is the daily current account balance estimate?

datasets.name: Distributional Wealth Accounts
datasets.description_short: Distributional breakdown of household wealth in the euro area, combining macro balance sheet data with micro survey data to show the distribution of net wealth, assets, and liabilities across the household wealth distribution.
use_cases: What share of total euro area household wealth is held by the wealthiest 10%?
How is housing wealth distributed across the household wealth distribution?
How has wealth inequality in the euro area changed over time?
What is the net wealth of the median household in Germany versus Italy?

datasets.name: ECB Consumer Survey
datasets.description_short: Older ECB consumer survey covering household expectations and perceptions on inflation, economic conditions, and major purchases. Predecessor to the more detailed Consumer Expectations Survey (CES).
use_cases: What were consumer inflation perceptions in the euro area?
How did household expectations for economic conditions evolve?
What is the historical record of consumer confidence surveys?

datasets.name: EONIA (Euro OverNight Index Average)
datasets.description_short: Historical data on EONIA, the euro overnight interest rate benchmark that was replaced by €STR in 2022. Provides the daily unsecured overnight lending rate between euro area banks.
use_cases: What was the historical path of EONIA before its discontinuation?
How did EONIA respond to ECB policy rate changes?
What was the spread between EONIA and the ECB deposit facility rate?

datasets.name: Securities issues statistics (ESA)
datasets.description_short: Securities issuance statistics based on the European System of Accounts (ESA 2010) framework, covering stocks and flows of debt securities by issuing sector, providing a national accounts-consistent view of financial markets.
use_cases: What is the total stock of debt securities issued by the government sector in ESA terms?
How do securities issuance flows compare to GDP across euro area countries?
What is the ESA 2010-consistent breakdown of securities by issuing sector?

datasets.name: Securities issues statistics (ESB)
datasets.description_short: Securities issuance statistics with an extended balance of payments perspective, covering cross-border holdings and flows of debt securities with geographic and sectoral breakdowns.
use_cases: What is the breakdown of debt securities by issuing sector and currency?
How do cross-border securities holdings compare across euro area countries?
What is the resident vs non-resident split in euro area bond holdings?

datasets.name: Euro Short-Term Rate (€STR)
datasets.description_short: Daily data on the €STR (Euro Short-Term Rate), the ECB's benchmark overnight interest rate for the euro area that replaced EONIA in 2022. Based on actual transactions in the unsecured overnight market.
use_cases: What is today's €STR rate?
How has €STR evolved since its introduction?
What is the spread between €STR and the ECB deposit facility rate?
How does €STR compare to the pre-2022 EONIA level?

datasets.name: Euro area accounts - quarterly (EWT)
datasets.description_short: Quarterly sectoral accounts for the euro area covering income, saving, investment, and financing flows by institutional sector. Provides a comprehensive picture of the macro-financial linkages between households, firms, government, and the rest of the world.
use_cases: What is the household saving rate in the euro area?
How has corporate investment evolved relative to corporate saving?
What is the government sector net lending position?
How do financial flows between sectors compare quarter-by-quarter?

datasets.name: Exchange Rates
datasets.description_short: Official ECB exchange rates for the euro against all major currencies, available at daily, monthly, quarterly, and annual frequency. The definitive reference for EUR bilateral exchange rates and effective exchange rate indices.
use_cases: What is the current EUR/USD exchange rate?
How has the euro depreciated or appreciated against the dollar this year?
What is the nominal effective exchange rate of the euro?
How does the euro compare to a basket of trading partner currencies?

datasets.name: Financial Markets
datasets.description_short: Broad financial market statistics covering money market rates, bond yields, stock market indices, credit spreads, and other financial market indicators across euro area countries and major global markets.
use_cases: What is the current 10-year German Bund yield?
How have Italian BTP spreads over Bunds evolved?
What are current euro area money market rates?
How have equity market valuations changed over the past year?

datasets.name: Financial Vehicle Corporations
datasets.description_short: Balance sheet statistics for financial vehicle corporations (FVCs) engaged in securitisation transactions in the euro area, covering assets and liabilities by type of securitised loan, originator sector, and investor.
use_cases: What is the total size of euro area securitisation vehicles?
Which asset classes are being securitised by euro area FVCs?
Which banking sectors are the largest originators of securitised loans?
How has the euro area securitisation market evolved since 2008?

datasets.name: FX interventions
datasets.description_short: Statistics on foreign exchange market interventions by euro area central banks, including purchase and sale operations in the FX market. Rare and highly market-sensitive data.
use_cases: Has the ECB intervened in FX markets recently?
What was the volume of FX interventions during periods of euro volatility?
What currencies were targeted in ECB FX operations?

datasets.name: Government statistics
datasets.description_short: Comprehensive government finance statistics for euro area and EU member states covering revenues, expenditures, deficits, debt, and related fiscal variables under the ESA 2010 accounting framework.
use_cases: What is France's government deficit as a share of GDP?
How does Italy's debt-to-GDP ratio compare to the euro area average?
What is the breakdown of government revenues across euro area countries?
Which euro area countries are currently subject to an excessive deficit procedure?
How has public spending on healthcare evolved across EU member states?

datasets.name: Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices
datasets.description_short: The HICP is the ECB's target inflation measure, covering all major expenditure categories across euro area countries. Available at various levels of detail from the headline index to individual product categories.
use_cases: What is the current euro area headline inflation rate?
How does core inflation differ from headline HICP?
Which HICP components are contributing most to current inflation?
How does inflation compare across euro area countries?
What is the trend in services inflation versus goods inflation?

datasets.name: Individual Counterparty Data - Balance sheet
datasets.description_short: Granular balance sheet data for individual pension funds and insurance companies, showing assets, liabilities, and their breakdowns by instrument, maturity, and counterpart. Part of the ECB's insurance and pension statistics framework.
use_cases: What is the asset allocation of euro area pension funds?
How are insurance company portfolios distributed across asset classes?
What is the maturity structure of pension fund liabilities?
How do technical provisions of insurers compare across euro area countries?

datasets.name: Individual Counterparty Data - Operations
datasets.description_short: Transaction-level data on financial operations by individual pension funds and insurance companies, capturing flows through their balance sheets including purchases, sales, and maturities of financial instruments.
use_cases: What financial instruments are pension funds buying or selling?
How have insurance company investment flows changed?
What is the net investment activity of euro area pension funds by asset class?

datasets.name: ICP - Individual country price data
datasets.description_short: Individual country-level consumer price data underlying the HICP, with detailed product-level breakdowns for each EU member state. Enables cross-country price comparison at a granular level.
use_cases: How do food prices compare between Germany and Poland?
Which country has the highest energy price inflation?
What is the HICP for services in Spain compared to the EU average?
How do housing costs vary across EU countries?

datasets.name: Insurance and Financial Intermediaries
datasets.description_short: Statistics on insurance corporations and other financial intermediaries in the euro area, covering balance sheets, investment portfolios, and technical reserves.
use_cases: What is the total size of the euro area insurance sector?
How are insurance company assets allocated across instruments?
What is the maturity breakdown of insurance sector liabilities?
How have technical reserves of euro area insurers evolved?

datasets.name: Interbank lending market
datasets.description_short: Data on the euro area interbank lending market, capturing overnight and term lending between banks. Provides insights into money market functioning and bank funding conditions.
use_cases: What is the volume of overnight interbank lending in the euro area?
How has the interbank market dried up or recovered since the financial crisis?
What is the breakdown of interbank lending by term?
How do secured versus unsecured interbank volumes compare?

datasets.name: International investment position - annual
datasets.description_short: Annual international investment position data for euro area countries, showing the stock of external assets and liabilities by instrument type and counterpart country. Provides a balance sheet view of external sector exposure.
use_cases: What is the net international investment position of Germany?
How large is the euro area's stock of outward foreign direct investment?
Which countries are the largest creditors and debtors in the euro area?
How has Spain's external debt evolved since the financial crisis?

datasets.name: Interest rate statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on interest rates applied by monetary financial institutions on loans and deposits to households and non-financial corporations, providing a comprehensive view of lending and deposit rates across the euro area.
use_cases: What is the average interest rate on new mortgages in Germany?
How do consumer credit rates compare across euro area countries?
What is the average rate on new business loans in Spain?
How have deposit rates evolved since the ECB started raising rates?

datasets.name: Investment funds
datasets.description_short: Balance sheet statistics for euro area investment funds (excluding money market funds), covering total net assets, shares issued, and portfolio breakdown by asset class, maturity, and geography.
use_cases: What is the total assets under management in euro area investment funds?
How are investment fund assets allocated across bonds, equities, and other instruments?
What are the net flows into and out of euro area investment funds?
How have bond fund assets evolved with rising interest rates?

datasets.name: Key Risk Indicators
datasets.description_short: Key risk indicators for the EU banking sector, providing standardised metrics on capital adequacy, asset quality, profitability, and liquidity used for macroprudential and supervisory analysis.
use_cases: What are the key risk metrics for the euro area banking sector?
How do capital ratios compare across EU banking systems?
What is the trend in non-performing loan ratios?
How has bank profitability evolved in the current rate environment?

datasets.name: Liquidity conditions
datasets.description_short: Data on liquidity conditions in the euro area banking system, including reserve balances, excess liquidity, and ECB balance sheet items related to monetary policy operations.
use_cases: What is the current level of excess liquidity in the euro area banking system?
How has excess liquidity evolved since the start of QE?
What are the net positions related to ECB monetary policy operations?
How do autonomous factors affect banking system liquidity?

datasets.name: Monetary Financial Institutions
datasets.description_short: Register and statistical data on monetary financial institutions (banks, money market funds, and central banks) in the euro area, including institution counts and structural indicators.
use_cases: How many banks are currently operating in the euro area?
How has banking sector consolidation progressed in different countries?
What is the breakdown of MFIs by institution type?
How many money market funds are registered in the euro area?

datasets.name: MFI Interest Rates
datasets.description_short: Monthly MFI interest rate statistics covering rates on new and outstanding loans and deposits to households and non-financial corporations, with breakdowns by loan type, maturity, and amount category.
use_cases: What is the current interest rate on new housing loans in the euro area?
How fast have deposit rates passed through ECB rate hikes?
What is the spread between lending rates and deposit rates?
How do MFI rates compare across euro area countries?

datasets.name: Money market statistics
datasets.description_short: Aggregate statistics on the euro area money market covering overnight, short-term secured and unsecured lending, FX swaps, and OIS transactions. Provides insight into money market functioning and ECB policy transmission.
use_cases: What is the total volume of overnight money market transactions?
How do secured versus unsecured money market volumes compare?
What are the dominant collateral types in the euro area repo market?
How have money market volumes evolved since policy rate normalization?

datasets.name: Money Market Statistical Reporting
datasets.description_short: Granular transaction-level money market data reported by the largest euro area banks covering secured, unsecured, FX swap, and OIS market segments. The most detailed source for euro area money market analysis.
use_cases: What is the daily volume and rate in the euro area secured overnight market?
How do unsecured money market rates compare to €STR?
What types of collateral are used in euro area repo transactions?
How does money market activity vary by counterparty sector?

datasets.name: Monetary Policy Decisions
datasets.description_short: Multi-variable dataset combining price, financial, and external sector indicators used in the ECB's BEAST model for monetary policy analysis, covering consumer prices, exchange rates, commodity prices, and economic activity measures.
use_cases: What commodity price inputs does the ECB use in its models?
How are exchange rate and commodity price assumptions incorporated in ECB projections?
What are the key external sector variables in ECB macroeconomic models?
What is the current level of key monetary policy input variables?

datasets.name: Net external claims
datasets.description_short: Net external claims statistics showing the difference between external assets and liabilities for euro area countries and sectors, providing a compact view of the net creditor/debtor position.
use_cases: What is the net creditor/debtor position of each euro area country?
Which sectors hold net external claims vs. net external liabilities?
How has the net external position changed over time?

datasets.name: Other Financial Intermediaries
datasets.description_short: Balance sheet statistics for other financial intermediaries (OFIs) in the euro area, covering entities like financial holding companies, securities dealers, and other entities not classified elsewhere in the financial sector.
use_cases: How large is the euro area shadow banking sector?
What types of assets do OFIs hold?
How have OFI balance sheets grown relative to the banking sector?
What is the cross-border exposure of euro area OFIs?

datasets.name: Open Market Operations
datasets.description_short: Data on ECB open market operations including main refinancing operations (MRO), longer-term refinancing operations (LTRO/TLTRO), and asset purchase programmes. Tracks the ECB's liquidity provision to the banking system.
use_cases: How much liquidity has the ECB provided through TLTROs?
What is the current outstanding stock of MRO and LTRO operations?
How have ECB asset purchases under APP and PEPP evolved?
What are the terms and rates of ECB refinancing operations?

datasets.name: Payments statistics
datasets.description_short: Comprehensive statistics on payment transactions in the EU, covering volumes and values of credit transfers, direct debits, card payments, and other payment instruments by country and transaction type.
use_cases: How many credit transfer transactions were processed in the euro area last year?
How has the use of card payments grown compared to cash?
What is the total value of SEPA credit transfers?
How do payment preferences differ across EU countries?

datasets.name: Payment card network statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment card network operations in the EU, covering transaction volumes and values by card type (credit, debit, prepaid) and payment scheme.
use_cases: How many transactions were processed through EU payment card networks?
What is the breakdown of card transactions by card type?
How do different payment schemes compare in transaction volume?
What is the total value of card payments in the euro area?

datasets.name: Provision of Credit to Private sector
datasets.description_short: Statistics on credit card transactions at point-of-sale terminals across the EU, with detailed breakdowns by card function, merchant category, authentication method, and fraud type.
use_cases: What share of card transactions use contactless payment?
How does card fraud vary by transaction channel?
What is the growth in e-commerce card payments?
How has strong customer authentication (SCA) affected card acceptance rates?

datasets.name: Payment card transactions statistics
datasets.description_short: Detailed statistics on payment card transactions across the EU, covering card-initiated payments by channel, scheme, strong customer authentication, and fraud type.
use_cases: What is the total number and value of card transactions in the EU?
How does card fraud compare across different transaction channels?
What is the adoption rate of contactless payments by country?
How has SCA implementation affected card payment fraud?

datasets.name: Public debt dynamics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment transactions categorized by initiator and channel, covering deferred debit card operations across EU countries. Part of the ECB payments statistics framework.
use_cases: What is the volume of deferred debit transactions in the EU?
How do payment transaction patterns vary by consent type?
What channels are used for deferred debit card transactions?

datasets.name: Pension schemes
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment transactions by e-money institutions and payment institutions across the EU, covering transaction volumes, values, and types by channel.
use_cases: What is the volume of transactions processed by e-money institutions?
How do payment institution transaction volumes compare to banks?
What channels are used by e-money institutions for transactions?

datasets.name: Price and Financial variables for the ECB BEAST model
datasets.description_short: Quarterly balance sheet data for pension funds and insurance companies in the euro area and EU member states, providing assets, liabilities, and investment portfolio breakdowns.
use_cases: What is the quarterly evolution of euro area pension fund assets?
How are insurance companies allocating their investment portfolios?
What are the technical provisions of euro area pension funds by country?
How has the bond allocation of institutional investors changed with rising rates?

datasets.name: Price and Financial variables for the ECB BEAST model (monthly)
datasets.description_short: Monthly data on pension fund membership and related indicators for euro area pension schemes, covering active members, deferred pensioners, and pensioners in payment.
use_cases: How many active members are in euro area pension schemes?
What is the ratio of active to retired members in pension funds?
How has pension fund membership evolved over time?

datasets.name: Price and Financial variables for the ECB BEAST model (real estate)
datasets.description_short: Balance sheet data specifically for pension funds and insurance companies with a focus on real estate assets, capturing direct and indirect real estate investment by institutional investors.
use_cases: What share of pension fund portfolios is allocated to real estate?
How has institutional investor exposure to property changed?
What is the total real estate investment by euro area pension funds and insurers?

datasets.name: Portfolio investment income statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment transactions involving portfolio investment income, tracking flows related to dividends, interest, and other investment income across EU payment systems.
use_cases: What are the flows of investment income payments across EU borders?
How do dividend and interest payment flows compare?
What is the trend in portfolio income transactions?

datasets.name: Payment and large-value settlement system statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on large-value payment systems in the EU, including TARGET2 and other high-value settlement systems, covering transaction volumes, values, and participant activity.
use_cases: What is the daily transaction volume through TARGET2?
How has the value of large-value payment transactions evolved?
How many banks participate in TARGET2 and how active are they?
What is the breakdown of TARGET2 transactions by initiator type?

datasets.name: Post-money creation statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment transactions by merchant category, covering card payments at points of sale by merchant type (retail, hospitality, transport, etc.).
use_cases: How is card spending distributed across merchant categories?
What merchant types generate the highest card transaction volumes?
How has spending at restaurants and hospitality venues trended?

datasets.name: Post-production costs
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment service providers' transaction volumes and values at the terminal level, with breakdowns by initiating channel, PSP category, and transaction type.
use_cases: What is the breakdown of payment transactions by payment service provider category?
How do in-store versus online payment volumes compare?
What is the market share of different PSP categories in EU payments?

datasets.name: Price stability in nominal terms
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment system participants in EU clearing and settlement systems, covering participant counts, types, and settlement volumes by system.
use_cases: How many institutions participate in major EU payment systems?
What types of institutions are direct participants in European clearing systems?
How has the number of payment system participants changed over time?

datasets.name: Payment and securities settlement systems
datasets.description_short: Comprehensive statistics on EU payment and securities settlement systems, covering transaction volumes, values, and operational indicators for CSDs, ICSDs, CCPs, and payment systems.
use_cases: What is the daily settlement volume through European securities settlement systems?
How does the settlement failure rate compare across EU CSDs?
What types of securities are settled through T2S?
How do settlement volumes compare across EU payment and securities systems?

datasets.name: Price stability terms
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment system transactions including cross-system statistics, covering flows between different payment systems and settlement infrastructure.
use_calls: How do transaction flows compare across different EU payment systems?
What is the volume of cross-system payment transactions?
use_cases: How do transaction flows compare across different EU payment systems?
What is the volume of cross-system payment transactions?
Which payment systems handle the largest value of transactions?

datasets.name: Payment transactions - nominal
datasets.description_short: Statistics on payment terminals (ATMs and POS terminals) across the EU, covering terminal counts, locations, and functional characteristics.
use_cases: How many ATMs are operating in the euro area?
What is the density of POS terminals across EU countries?
How has the number of ATMs changed with the shift to digital payments?
What share of POS terminals support contactless payments?

datasets.name: Payment transactions - total
datasets.description_short: Total payment transaction statistics covering all payment types and channels across EU countries, providing a comprehensive view of payment activity.
use_cases: What is the total value of payment transactions in the EU?
How do domestic versus cross-border payment volumes compare?
What is the trend in total cashless payment transactions?
How does total payment activity compare across EU countries?

datasets.name: Reserve Assets
datasets.description_short: Reserve assets statistics for euro area central banks, covering gold, foreign currency reserves, IMF positions, SDRs, and other reserve assets. Key indicator of external buffer capacity.
use_cases: What are the total foreign exchange reserves held by the euro area?
How much gold does the ECB and euro area central banks hold?
How have reserve assets evolved during periods of exchange rate pressure?
What is the breakdown of reserves by component (gold, forex, SDR)?

datasets.name: Reserve Assets (international)
datasets.description_short: International reserve assets data combining multiple ECB datasets into an integrated view of financial flows, stocks, and other macroeconomic indicators for the euro area.
use_cases: What is the integrated view of euro area international financial position?
How do reserve asset flows relate to other balance of payments components?
What are the key macro-financial linkages captured in integrated data?

datasets.name: Residential real estate demand
datasets.description_short: Financial market indicators related to residential real estate demand, capturing price dynamics, transaction volumes, and financing conditions in euro area housing markets.
use_cases: How has housing demand evolved across euro area countries?
What market indicators are pointing to changes in residential property demand?
How do housing market conditions compare between euro area countries?

datasets.name: Residential real estate finance
datasets.description_short: Financial market data on residential real estate financing, covering mortgage rates, lending volumes, and financing conditions across euro area housing markets.
use_cases: What are current mortgage rates across euro area countries?
How has housing credit growth evolved?
What financing conditions are available for residential property purchases?
How do mortgage markets compare across euro area countries?

datasets.name: Reserve requirements - excess and deficiency
datasets.description_short: Data on the reserve requirement compliance of euro area credit institutions, showing excess and deficient reserve positions relative to required reserve minimums.
use_cases: How much excess reserves do euro area banks hold?
Are any banks in reserve deficiency positions?
How have excess reserves evolved relative to required minimums?
What is the distribution of reserve positions across euro area banks?

datasets.name: Reserve requirements - holdings
datasets.description_short: Data on actual reserve holdings of euro area credit institutions, showing the observed reserve levels maintained with national central banks during each maintenance period.
use_cases: What is the total stock of reserves held at euro area central banks?
How do actual reserve holdings compare to required minimums?
How have reserve holdings evolved over monetary policy maintenance periods?

datasets.name: Reserve requirements - rates
datasets.description_short: Data on reserve requirement rates applied to euro area credit institutions, showing the percentage ratios applied to different deposit liabilities for calculating required reserves.
use_cases: What is the current reserve requirement ratio for euro area banks?
How has the reserve requirement rate changed over time?
Which liability categories are subject to reserve requirements?

datasets.name: Reserve requirements - volumes
datasets.description_short: Data on the volume of reserve requirements, showing the amount of required reserves calculated from the liability base of euro area credit institutions.
use_cases: What is the total required reserve volume for euro area banks?
How does the reserve requirement volume vary across countries?
How has the reserve requirement base changed with shifts in bank liabilities?

datasets.name: Real interest rates
datasets.description_short: Real interest rate statistics adjusting nominal bank lending and deposit rates for inflation, providing a view of the real cost of borrowing and real return on savings across euro area countries.
use_cases: What is the real interest rate on household mortgages after adjusting for inflation?
How do real deposit rates compare across euro area countries?
When did real interest rates turn positive after the inflation surge?
How do real lending rates affect corporate investment decisions?

datasets.name: Residential property prices
datasets.description_short: Residential property price indices for euro area countries covering new and existing dwellings, with breakdowns by property type (apartment/house) and geographic coverage (urban/rural). Key dataset for housing market and macroprudential analysis.
use_cases: How have house prices evolved in Germany over the past decade?
Which euro area countries have seen the strongest property price growth?
How do apartment prices compare to house prices across euro area cities?
Are residential property prices overvalued relative to rents or incomes?

datasets.name: Residential property prices - vintages
datasets.description_short: Vintage data for residential property prices, capturing successive revisions to property price indices to enable real-time analysis and revision study of house price data.
use_cases: How large are the revisions to house price data between vintages?
What was the initially published house price growth versus the final revised figure?
How does real-time house price data differ from the final dataset?

datasets.name: Real-time data
datasets.description_short: Real-time database of key macroeconomic indicators capturing the first-release, vintage, and final data to study data revisions and real-time analysis for the euro area.
use_cases: How large are GDP revisions from flash estimate to final data in the euro area?
What did economic forecasters see in real-time versus what data shows now?
How do first-release macroeconomic indicators differ from revised data?

datasets.name: Survey on the Access to Finance of Enterprises
datasets.description_short: Bi-annual survey of euro area firms on their experience accessing external finance, covering bank loans, trade credit, equity, and other instruments, with breakdowns by firm size, sector, age, and country.
use_cases: What share of euro area SMEs report difficulties accessing bank financing?
How has credit availability for small firms changed in the current tightening cycle?
How do financing conditions for SMEs compare to large firms?
In which countries are SMEs most credit-constrained?

datasets.name: Securities holdings
datasets.description_short: Securities holding statistics showing who holds what debt securities in the euro area, by holder sector, issuer sector, and currency. Part of the ECB's Securities Holdings Statistics group.
use_cases: What share of euro area government bonds is held by foreign investors?
How much of euro area corporate bonds are held by investment funds?
How has the ECB's share of government bond holdings changed under QE?
What is the sectoral breakdown of holders of euro area debt securities?

datasets.name: Securities issues by euro area residents - euro
datasets.description_short: Statistics on securities settled through European securities settlement systems (euro-denominated), capturing clearing and settlement activity across EU exchanges and trading venues.
use_cases: What are the settlement volumes on major European stock exchanges?
How do different securities settlement systems compare in volume?
What types of securities are being cleared through EU systems?

datasets.name: Survey on credit terms and conditions in euro-denominated securities financing
datasets.description_short: Quarterly survey of large euro area banks on terms and conditions in securities financing transactions and OTC derivatives markets, covering haircuts, margins, collateral, and pricing.
use_cases: Are haircuts in the repo market tightening or loosening?
How are credit terms changing for hedge fund securities financing?
What collateral types are most commonly accepted in euro-denominated repo?
How are OTC derivative margin requirements evolving?

datasets.name: Securities Holdings and Investment
datasets.description_short: Housing market indicators covering dwelling transactions, housing completions, housing starts, housing stock, and household housing affordability metrics.
use_cases: How many residential properties were transacted in euro area countries last year?
What is the trend in new housing completions?
How does housing supply respond to price increases?
What is the housing affordability index across euro area countries?

datasets.name: Securities Holdings Statistics
datasets.description_short: Granular security-by-security data on holdings of debt and equity securities by sector and country, part of the ECB's Securities Holdings Statistics group. Enables analysis of cross-border portfolio investment and investor base composition.
use_cases: What share of French government bonds are held by foreign investors?
How are euro area banks' securities portfolios distributed geographically?
What is the home bias in euro area institutional investor portfolios?
How have cross-border securities holdings evolved under the capital markets union?

datasets.name: Survey of Professional Forecasters
datasets.description_short: ECB quarterly survey collecting inflation, GDP growth, and unemployment forecasts from professional economic forecasters, capturing the distribution of expectations over various horizons.
use_cases: What do professional forecasters expect euro area inflation to be in two years?
How have long-run inflation expectations evolved over time?
What is the uncertainty around GDP growth forecasts?
How do SPF forecasts compare to ECB staff projections?

datasets.name: Securities statistics - issuers
datasets.description_short: Statistics on debt securities issuers, capturing the balance sheet items (assets and liabilities) of entities issuing securities from the issuer perspective.
use_cases: What is the total outstanding debt securities by issuing sector?
How do issuer balance sheets reflect securities outstanding?
What is the cross-border component of euro area debt securities issuance?

datasets.name: Securities statistics - prices
datasets.description_short: Price-related statistics for euro area debt securities, covering yields, spreads, and valuations by issuer sector, instrument type, and maturity.
use_cases: What are current yields on euro area corporate bonds by rating?
How have sovereign bond prices changed across the euro area?
What is the spread between investment grade and high yield corporate bonds?
How do bond prices reflect changing interest rate expectations?

datasets.name: Securities statistics - total
datasets.description_short: Total securities settlement statistics for EU securities settlement systems including both CSD and exchange-based clearing, providing aggregate volumes and values.
use_cases: What is the total settlement volume across all European securities settlement systems?
How do settlement volumes compare across CSD systems?
What is the total value of securities settled in the EU?

datasets.name: Short-term statistics 1
datasets.description_short: Short-term external statistics for the euro area covering goods trade, services trade, and financial account data at high frequency for use in conjunction with the balance of payments framework.
use_cases: What are the latest monthly trade balance figures for the euro area?
How have goods exports trended over the past six months?
What is the current financial account balance on a monthly basis?

datasets.name: Short-term statistics 3
datasets.description_short: Additional short-term external statistics for the euro area providing supplementary breakdowns for balance of payments components at monthly frequency.
use_cases: What supplementary breakdowns are available for euro area BOP data?
How do short-term statistics supplement annual external accounts?
What is the monthly breakdown of specific BOP components?

datasets.name: Short-term business statistics
datasets.description_short: Short-term business activity indicators covering industrial production, construction, retail trade, and services across euro area countries. Core dataset for tracking the business cycle.
use_cases: What is the latest industrial production index for the euro area?
How have retail sales trended in Germany over the past year?
Is construction activity growing or contracting?
How does services sector activity compare to manufacturing?

datasets.name: Securities trading platform statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on securities issued and traded on European trading platforms, covering price, yield, maturity, and credit rating information for debt securities at issuance.
use_cases: What are the yields on newly issued euro area corporate bonds?
How does the credit rating distribution of new debt issuance look?
What maturities are most commonly issued for euro area bonds?
How are new bond characteristics varying with market conditions?

datasets.name: Short-term statistics
datasets.description_short: Broad short-term statistics covering business surveys, economic sentiment, and activity indicators from multiple national and European institutions for the euro area.
use_cases: What is the current economic sentiment indicator for the euro area?
How does the business climate survey read for euro area industry?
What do short-term statistics say about the current economic cycle phase?
How do survey-based and hard economic indicators compare?

datasets.name: Supervisory data
datasets.description_short: Supervisory statistics for significant banks under ECB direct supervision (SSM), covering capital adequacy, asset quality, profitability, and liquidity with breakdowns by bank size, domicile, and business model.
use_cases: What is the average CET1 ratio for banks under ECB direct supervision?
How do capital ratios differ between large and mid-size supervised banks?
What is the non-performing loan ratio across SSM significant institutions?
How has profitability of directly supervised banks evolved?

datasets.name: Survey data
datasets.description_short: Composite survey data from multiple European economic survey sources, covering consumer and business sentiment, economic activity expectations, and sector-specific confidence indicators.
use_cases: What is the composite economic sentiment indicator for the euro area?
How does consumer confidence compare across EU countries?
What do business surveys say about the employment outlook?
How do survey indicators compare across different data providers?

datasets.name: TARGET/Gross settlement and banking statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on TARGET2 interbank settlements and related banking flows, capturing the real-time gross settlement activity of euro area central banks and their counterparts.
use_cases: What is the daily transaction volume through TARGET2?
How have TARGET2 balances evolved across euro area central banks?
What is the breakdown of TARGET2 flows by participant type?
How do cross-border TARGET2 flows reflect capital movements?

datasets.name: Trade in goods
datasets.description_short: Monthly statistics on euro area trade in goods, covering exports and imports by product category and partner country. The key source for merchandise trade analysis in the euro area.
use_cases: What is the euro area trade balance in goods with the United States?
How have export volumes evolved compared to export values?
Which product categories are driving euro area export growth?
How does intra-EU trade compare to extra-EU trade in magnitude?

datasets.name: Wholesale funding statistics
datasets.description_short: Statistics on wholesale funding markets for euro area banks, covering interbank deposits, debt securities issued, and repos from a funding perspective.
use_cases: How are euro area banks funding themselves in wholesale markets?
What is the breakdown of wholesale funding by instrument type?
How has the reliance on repo versus unsecured wholesale funding changed?
Which currencies are used in euro area bank wholesale funding?

datasets.name: Yield curve
datasets.description_short: ECB estimates of the euro area sovereign yield curve, including spot rates, forward rates, and related measures for the AAA-rated and all-issuer euro area government bond universe.
use_cases: What is the current euro area yield curve shape (normal, inverted, flat)?
What does the yield curve imply about expected short-term rates in 5 years?
How has the slope of the yield curve changed over the tightening cycle?
What is the 10-year spot rate on the AAA euro area sovereign yield curve?
